title: Link (via URL) to group on board
excerpt:

posts.author: Eltjo (Eltjo Smit)
posts.cookedHtml:
I find myself more often trying to redirect team members to a group within a board.

My workflow now is to copy paste the title of that group into slack or an email. Then I copy paste the board url and tell them in the mail they have to go to the group with the title mentioned.

It would be great just to copy paste a url from the group I would like team members or clients to go to.

Suggestions:

  1. This could be done with a url from the filter (this can also be done manually but the dis advance of this is that you do not see the other groups).
  2. This could be done by an anchor on the group so clients and team members will automatically get redirected to that group

Thanks!

_16__OF_Corp_D8___Product_backlog1291×713 45.1 KB

posts.author: nick.foster (Nick Foster)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Eltjo,
This is a super valuable idea and one that I need as well. When a board has more than 3 groups or a long list of items. It is very valuable to be able to link a newbie to a specific group of items as opposed to a specific one or the whole board. Deep linking is a super valuable feature.
I hope MDC implements this soon.
Nick

posts.author: MaayanK (Maayan Karstaedt)
posts.cookedHtml: How come this didn’t get more votes by now? surprised. sorely missing this capability

posts.author: orenk (Oren Kaufman)
posts.cookedHtml: Totally agree. Would love to see this added.

posts.author: alex.walton (Alex Walton)
posts.cookedHtml: I also would find this feature really useful. It would be great to have the deep link or anchor function added.

posts.author: Valigara (Igor Nusinovich)
posts.cookedHtml: Absolutely needed, would make groups much more useful!

posts.author: evan (Evan Fraser)
posts.cookedHtml:
Got my vote, would love to see this implemented. In my setup I have Opportunities which holds all of my deals, and a projects board that has a group per customer. Instead of scrolling through a bunch of group/customers, would be great to just go to accounts, and click a link to an assigned group or groups.

This could also be a widget, so you dont have to be redirected to a separate board, and instead you could view your chosen group on an items widget view

posts.author: jbeahan (Jen Beahan)
posts.cookedHtml: Echoing other comments = this would be super useful. We have MANY different clients that we keep all on the same board based on where they are in onboarding … being able to directly link to a specific group [for us this is the client’s name] would greatly aid in navigating boards and communicating with other team members.

posts.author: MarcFreedman (Marc)
posts.cookedHtml: It gets my vote too. It’s odd that virtually everything has a link but Groups.

posts.author: nurdini (Nur Dini)
posts.cookedHtml:
Voted for this, just realized the need as I have a main board with list of groups in different board.

My teammates keep on clicking the item name, thinking they’ll be redirected to the details

posts.author: mattgonzfiu (Matthew Gonzalez)
posts.cookedHtml: Commenting just to make it clear this would still be a valuable feature.

posts.author: wordisbohn (Brandon Bohn)
posts.cookedHtml: Add my vote. This would be super useful.

posts.author: sherlock (Jennifer Swaney)
posts.cookedHtml: This is definitely sorely needed for complex plans that need a long list of groups to properly manage all the work and deliverables. Can’t believe it isn’t there yet. voted for and hope this gets more attention soon.
